channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A Proposal to Seize AI Company Shares
item.description: Owning the companies eliminates the need for taxation.

item.title: How Republicans Can Boost Their Midterm Prospects
item.description: They should aim to create a lasting immigration policy.

item.title: The Iran Cease-Fire Collapses
item.description: Trump is correct to reject MOU violations, but his next steps remain unclear.

item.title: Young Washingtonâs NaÃ¯ve Appeal
item.description: Challenging resistance to American history and mythology.
